justification: The issue describes a deadlock condition when importing numpy from within a dlopen() context on glibc < 2.34 with MKL BLAS.
current_state_summary: The issue is classified as a bug based on the provided description and related issues. The classification of related issues [29442, 27870, 28844] supports this categorization.

related_issues.title: BUG: calling np.sqrt on an array containing only floats, but of dtype object, will crash
BUG: Confusing error message when `numpy` importing `numpy.__config__` raises `ImportError` for legit reasons
